title: Fatal New Year’s day shooting leads to court appearance
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KWANONQABA NEWS -  The man accused of the murder of 22-year-old Onam Nqumasile made his first appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on Monday 5 January.","html":"KWANONQABA NEWS - The man accused of the murder of 22-year-old Onam Nqumasile made his first appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on Monday 5 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Nqumasile was fatally shot in KwaNonqaba on New Year's Day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Following the shooting, Tshepo Malope (37) was arrested by KwaNonqaba police on Saturday 3 January.","html":"Following the shooting, Tshepo Malope (37) was arrested by KwaNonqaba police on Saturday 3 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to KwaNonqaba Police Spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, witnesses reportedly saw Malope and Nqumasile arguing, which then escalated when Malope allegedly pulled out a firearm and shot the victim.","html":"According to KwaNonqaba Police Spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, witnesses reportedly saw Malope and Nqumasile arguing, which then escalated when Malope allegedly pulled out a firearm and shot the victim."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The motive for the shooting is not yet known at this stage.","html":"The motive for the shooting is not yet known at this stage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The matter has been postponed to Tuesday 20 January where proceedings for a formal bail application will begin.","html":"The matter has been postponed to Tuesday 20 January where proceedings for a formal bail application will begin."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Malope has remained in police custody since his arrest."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone with information regarding the incident can contact the investigating officer, Warrant Officer Geoffrey Moos on 060 651 5948.","html":"Anyone with information regarding the incident can contact the investigating officer, Warrant Officer Geoffrey Moos on 060 651 5948."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Fatal New Year’s day shooting leads to court appearance
